expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Add admin-controlled member lifecycle management with auditable changes.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership invitation and role persistence rules",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership records to store invite state and allowed roles so admin actions run against validated data.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership persistence supports invite state and viewer, editor, and admin roles.",
        "Validation rejects unsupported role values before persistence.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/workspace-members.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add audit log storage for membership changes",
      "description": "As a workspace owner, I want member changes recorded in structured audit storage so administrators can review what changed later.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit log storage records invite, role-change, and revoke events with actor and timestamp.",
        "Membership actions can append audit entries without schema changes in later stories.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/workspace-member-audit-log.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-audit-model.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Invite members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so I can grant access without database edits.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin invite flow creates or updates a pending membership for supplied email.",
        "Successful invite writes a matching membership audit log entry.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/invite-member.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Change workspace member role",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so access matches responsibility.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin role-change flow updates an existing membership to viewer, editor, or admin.",
        "Successful role changes append an audit log entry describing old and new role values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/change-member-role.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so former members cannot keep using the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admin revoke flow removes or disables active membership access without direct database edits.",
        "Successful revocation appends an audit log entry for the membership change.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/revoke-member-access.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001",
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Show audit view in workspace settings page",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want an audit view in workspace settings page so I can review recent membership changes.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page shows recent membership audit log entries with action, actor, and timestamp.",
        "Audit view refreshes after member invite, role change, and revoke actions complete.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/settings/member-audit-view.*",
        "src/workspaces/settings/page.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002",
        "US-003",
        "US-004",
        "US-005"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
